nodes.label: Pitch Modulation Chain Signal
nodes.description: Pitch modulation signal from the parent sound generator's pitch modulation chain, received via fixed runtime_target connection (hash 90001)

nodes.label: Rate Matching
nodes.description: Linear interpolation to upsample control-rate signal to audio rate (when needed)

nodes.label: Pitch Factor Passthrough
nodes.description: Signal passes through unmodified as raw pitch factor values (Pitch mode -- no transformation)

nodes.label: ProcessSignal
nodes.description: When enabled, writes pitch modulation signal to audio channel 0

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Unnormalised pitch factor values (0.5 = octave down, 1.0 = no change, 2.0 = octave up)

nodes.label: Audio Out
nodes.description: Audio channel 0 output (only active when ProcessSignal is enabled)

nodes.label: Display Buffer
nodes.description: Ring buffer with pitchFactorToNormalisedRange transform for display
